players.name: henry.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Defect on the first round only, then mirror the opponent's last move.

players.name: dave.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Alternate cooperate and defect regardless of history.

players.name: ivy.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Cooperate if cumulative score is behind the opponent's; otherwise defect.

players.name: jack.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Tit-for-tat with occasional random cooperate to probe trust.

players.name: kelly.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Defect if opponent defected last round; otherwise cooperate.

players.name: liam.eth
players.strategyPrompt: Start cooperating; after two consecutive opponent defects, always defect.
